title: TOPS mod
description: TOPS is a Minecraft Forge mod built for the TOPS modpack, adding unique features to enhance your gameplay experience.
body:
TOPS: Ascend with Toptonium!

Are you ready to push the boundaries of your Minecraft adventures? The TOPS mod introduces Toptonium, a mystical new ore exclusively found within the perilous End Islands. Venture into the void beyond the main island to discover rare veins of this glowing, otherworldly resource.

Mine Toptonium Ore to smelt powerful Toptonium Ingots, the foundational material for a future of advanced crafting. Compact your ingots into a sleek Block of Toptonium for storage or to add an exotic touch to your End-themed builds. While this initial release lays the groundwork, exciting updates are planned to unlock Toptonium's full potential, including unique tools, armor, and even new mechanics that will transform your End-game experience.

Dive into the End, face its challenges, and harness the power of Toptonium with the TOPS mod – your next step in Minecraft progression!
